title: leptorkis olivacea
intro: Leptorkis olivacea, also known as the greenbottle orchid, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Leptorkis olivacea are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
